overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic Japanese-inspired urban district. The player moves from a covered area with red torii-like structures through open plazas and sunlit streets with elevated highways, ending in a neon-lit covered walkway. The scene features a distinctive mix of traditional Japanese and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered entrance with red torii gate structure and neon lighting

events.description: delivery truck passes from left to right in front of the camera
moving from under the covered torii structure into the open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking forward under the red structure, pausing briefly for the truck to pass before continuing

notable_agents.action: delivery truck driving from left to right across the path

entered.detail: large red structural pillars with vertical neon lights forming a traditional Japanese gate entrance
white building with Japanese architectural elements and red paper lanterns hanging from the roof
green neon tube lights running along the overhead roof structure

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a large red torii gate structure with green neon lighting. A delivery truck passes in front of the camera before the player moves forward into a plaza area, leaving the covered entrance behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete plaza with stairs leading to upper level

events.description: exits covered torii gate area into open concrete plaza
begins ascending wide concrete stairs on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and ascending a set of concrete stairs toward the upper level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white hat walking up the stairs ahead of the camera
group of pedestrians walking across the plaza in various directions

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading up to higher plaza level
low rectangular concrete seating blocks arranged in the plaza
large industrial structure with distinctive teal colored walls and metal pipes

segments.scene_description: Moving from the covered entrance into an open concrete plaza with scattered pedestrians. The camera approaches and begins ascending a wide staircase on the right, with a large teal industrial building becoming visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with industrial architecture and stairways

events.description: emerging into direct bright sunlight from the shaded lower plaza
turning slightly toward the street exit from the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking across the open upper plaza toward the street, passing by industrial structures and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red cap walking down the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: yellow metal scaffolding attached to the side of the industrial building
multi-story building with green-tinted windows and beige facade
building entrance with bright purple neon lighting around the doors

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a sunlit open plaza with the teal industrial building now on the left. The scene includes metal scaffolding, a modern office building, and a purple-lit doorway as the player heads toward the street exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside elevated highway with palm trees

events.description: exiting plaza onto city street with elevated highway and palm trees
continuing straight along the sidewalk passing multiple pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to an elevated highway, passing palm trees and other pedestrians in bright sunlight

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with rolling suitcase walking toward the camera
cars driving on the street below the elevated highway

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway structure running parallel to the sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the street between the sidewalk and the road
large electronic advertising screens mounted on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a bright sunlit city street with an elevated highway running parallel on the right. Palm trees line the street and digital billboards are visible on distant skyscrapers as the camera moves along the busy sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with colorful buildings and food vendors

events.description: crossing the street at a yellow striped crosswalk
entering covered walkway with neon lighting and steam vents

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk and entering a covered walkway area with food stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street ahead of the camera
black car driving on the street

entered.detail: vibrant blue building with red trim, multiple balconies, and Asian architectural elements
small outdoor food vendor with green awning and neon signage
steam rising from a street level vent near the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a yellow crosswalk toward a vibrant blue building with a food stall at street level. After crossing, the player enters a covered walkway area with steam rising from vents and neon lighting becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon signs and graffiti art

events.description: entering shaded covered walkway with artificial neon lighting replacing sunlight
continuing straight through the covered corridor passing under signs

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway passing under neon signs and alongside graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead in the covered walkway

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure providing full cover over the pedestrian path
wall covered with colorful street art, posters, and graffiti tags
tall vertical neon sign with Japanese characters glowing in pink and blue

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a covered pedestrian walkway shielded from the sun. The environment features graffiti-covered walls, overhead neon signs with Japanese characters, and a darker, more enclosed atmosphere as the camera continues forward through the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a traditional-inspired gateway through a bright urban plaza and finally into a dense, neon-lit corridor. It begins under a large red torii gate with green neon accents, moving past a delivery truck and out into an open concrete plaza where the camera ascends a wide staircase toward a teal industrial building. As the player progresses through the sunlit square past metal scaffolding and a purple-lit doorway, the scene opens onto a bright city street lined with palm trees and an elevated highway. The camera then crosses a yellow crosswalk toward a vibrant blue building and a food stall before transitioning from the sunlight into a covered pedestrian walkway. Finally, the environment shifts into a darker, enclosed atmosphere characterized by rising steam, graffiti-covered walls, and overhead neon signs with Japanese characters.
